item.title: Owncast Newsletter May/June 2026
item.description: This is the most recent copy of the Owncast community newsletter, originally published at owncast.ghost.io. Subscribe to get it in your inbox here. By Kit Rhett Aultman — May 26, 2026 In This Issue A Note From The Editor Technical Updates Owncast 0.2.5 Released Features Invasion Of The Owncast Bots Featured Streamer: Love A Brother Radio Closing Remarks A Note From The Editor Oh, heck, where did the time go? This is the longest time off the newsletter has taken and I’m actually a bit embarrassed about it.
